about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate developer, always looking for new technical challenges
about.intro1: Full-Stack Developer with over 3 years of experience, I'm passionate about creating innovative technological solutions. My expertise spans from modern web development with React and Next.js to integrating artificial intelligence solutions.
about.intro2: Currently based in Ottawa-Gatineau, I work on projects that combine web development and AI to create exceptional user experiences and solve complex problems.
about.journey1: My journey in development started several years ago with a passion for solving problems and building useful things. Since then, I've had the opportunity to work on various projects, from web applications to artificial intelligence systems.
about.journey2: I studied at La Cité Collégiale where I earned my diploma in computer programming. This education gave me a solid foundation in software development and allowed me to explore different technologies.
about.journey3: Today, I continue to learn and improve, always curious about new technologies and industry best practices.
about.webDevDesc: Building performant and intuitive web applications with the latest technologies like React, Next.js, and Node.js.
about.aiDesc: Exploring and implementing AI solutions to solve complex problems, especially in computer vision and natural language processing.
about.cloudDesc: Designing and deploying scalable infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP with a DevOps approach.
about.mentoringDesc: Sharing my knowledge and helping other developers grow in their careers.
about.qualityDesc: I'm committed to delivering clean, maintainable, and performant code.
about.innovationDesc: Always looking for creative and efficient solutions.
about.collaborationDesc: Working as a team to achieve common goals.
about.ctaDesc: I'm always open to discussing new projects and opportunities.
